title.en: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
title.th: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries

summary.en: Anthropic is announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network.
summary.th: Anthropic is announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS). TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network.

body.alt: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries

text.en: We’re announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), one of the world’s largest technology services companies. TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network, our network of consulting and services firms that help bring Claude to their enterprise clients.
text.th: We’re announcing a partnership with Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), one of the world’s largest technology services companies. TCS will provide Claude to 50,000 of its own employees across 56 countries; build Claude-powered products for clients in financial services, healthcare, the public sector, and other regulated industries; and join the Claude Partner Network, our network of consulting and services firms that help bring Claude to their enterprise clients.

text.en: Regulated industries need their work to be highly accurate and auditable, and enterprises in these fields already use Claude for that reason. TCS brings decades of experience delivering technology that is compliant with companies’ regulatory requirements—and the reach to bring Claude to thousands of enterprises worldwide.
text.th: Regulated industries need their work to be highly accurate and auditable, and enterprises in these fields already use Claude for that reason. TCS brings decades of experience delivering technology that is compliant with companies’ regulatory requirements—and the reach to bring Claude to thousands of enterprises worldwide.

text.en: As “customer zero,” TCS will put Claude to work across its own engineering, finance, legal, marketing, and sales teams, using what it learns to shape how it brings Claude to clients. It’s also building a dedicated practice for this partnership, bringing together consultants, engineers, and industry specialists who will design and run Claude-based systems for clients. TCS will package Claude into industry-specific offerings, such as claims processing for insurers and lending advisory for banks, and its teams will implement and run them for clients in financial services, public services, life sciences, healthcare, aviation, telecom, and medical technology.
text.th: As “customer zero,” TCS will put Claude to work across its own engineering, finance, legal, marketing, and sales teams, using what it learns to shape how it brings Claude to clients. It’s also building a dedicated practice for this partnership, bringing together consultants, engineers, and industry specialists who will design and run Claude-based systems for clients. TCS will package Claude into industry-specific offerings, such as claims processing for insurers and lending advisory for banks, and its teams will implement and run them for clients in financial services, public services, life sciences, healthcare, aviation, telecom, and medical technology.

text.en: This work is already underway. For example:
text.th: This work is already underway. For example:

text.en: Diligenta, TCS’s UK life and pensions business, will use Claude to improve the customer experience for the more than 22 million policyholders it serves.
text.th: Diligenta, TCS’s UK life and pensions business, will use Claude to improve the customer experience for the more than 22 million policyholders it serves.

text.en: TCS’s banking and financial services product teams will use Claude Code to boost productivity around software engineering and IT operations.
text.th: TCS’s banking and financial services product teams will use Claude Code to boost productivity around software engineering and IT operations.

text.en: TCS’s engineering teams will add reusable skills and plugins to the Claude Code ecosystem, starting with ones focused on claims adjudication and lending advisory.
text.th: TCS’s engineering teams will add reusable skills and plugins to the Claude Code ecosystem, starting with ones focused on claims adjudication and lending advisory.

text.en: TCS iON, which conducts more than 75 million assessments each year across 1,500 cities in India, will deliver Claude training and certification.
text.th: TCS iON, which conducts more than 75 million assessments each year across 1,500 cities in India, will deliver Claude training and certification.

text.en: “Enterprise AI value comes from understanding business context, orchestrating complex systems, and applying deep AI engineering talent,” said K. Krithivasan, Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director of TCS. “By combining Claude with our industry expertise, engineering rigor, and large-scale transformation capabilities, we will help customers move faster to production—especially in industries where trust, resilience, and regulatory discipline are critical. This partnership reflects TCS’s broader strategy to help clients become perpetually adaptive enterprises by turning frontier AI into transformation at enterprise scale.”
text.th: “Enterprise AI value comes from understanding business context, orchestrating complex systems, and applying deep AI engineering talent,” said K. Krithivasan, Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director of TCS. “By combining Claude with our industry expertise, engineering rigor, and large-scale transformation capabilities, we will help customers move faster to production—especially in industries where trust, resilience, and regulatory discipline are critical. This partnership reflects TCS’s broader strategy to help clients become perpetually adaptive enterprises by turning frontier AI into transformation at enterprise scale.”

text.en: “We built Claude to be safe, trusted, and helpful, particularly in contexts where accuracy matters most,” said Dario Amodei, Co-founder and CEO of Anthropic. “This partnership deepens our commitment to India, our second-largest market, with TCS bringing Claude to enterprises and professionals across the region and globally.”
text.th: “We built Claude to be safe, trusted, and helpful, particularly in contexts where accuracy matters most,” said Dario Amodei, Co-founder and CEO of Anthropic. “This partnership deepens our commitment to India, our second-largest market, with TCS bringing Claude to enterprises and professionals across the region and globally.”

text.en: “This partnership reflects our shared conviction that AI will be foundational and transformative for enterprises worldwide,” said N Chandrasekaran, Chairman, Tata Sons. “By combining Anthropic's capabilities with Tata Group’s scale, trusted relationships, and nation-building commitment, we will accelerate enterprise reinvention and equip India’s youth with the skills to lead in the AI era.”
text.th: “This partnership reflects our shared conviction that AI will be foundational and transformative for enterprises worldwide,” said N Chandrasekaran, Chairman, Tata Sons. “By combining Anthropic's capabilities with Tata Group’s scale, trusted relationships, and nation-building commitment, we will accelerate enterprise reinvention and equip India’s youth with the skills to lead in the AI era.”

text.en: To learn more about the Claude Partner Network, visit anthropic.com/partners.
text.th: To learn more about the Claude Partner Network, visit anthropic.com/partners.

text.en: Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available

text.en: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
